overall.description: A first-person perspective from a ship's bridge at night, featuring three navigation monitors displaying charts, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters in what appears to be a maritime simulation game.

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge while monitoring the radar display and navigation charts

entered.detail: left screen displaying coastal navigation map with landmass and waypoints
center circular display with rotating yellow radar sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
right screen showing blue sonar or depth sounding data
illuminated bow deck and railings of the ship visible through the bridge windows
metal safety railing and window frame structure at the front of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the illuminated bow deck. Three navigation monitors dominate the upper view, with the center radar display showing a continuously rotating sweep. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters while the operator monitors the navigation systems.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark maritime environment. It begins with a view looking forward over the illuminated bow deck, where the glow of the ship's lights cuts through the surrounding night. As the vessel moves steadily through the dark waters, the focus remains on the three dominant navigation monitors positioned in the upper view. The scene centers on the rhythmic movement of the center radar display, which shows a continuously rotating sweep while the operator monitors the systems.
